requirement_topic.en: EDSA / EWRC Grid Connection for BESS — 230/400 V 50 Hz System, Donor-Referenced IEC 62933, and Mini-Grid Operator Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: EDSA / EWRC BESS并网——230/400 V 50 Hz系统、捐助方引用的IEC 62933及微电网运营商要求
requirement_topic.zht: EDSA / EWRC BESS併網——230/400 V 50 Hz系統、捐助方引用的IEC 62933及微電網運營商要求

summary.en: Sierra Leone's electricity sector is regulated by the Electricity and Water Regulatory Commission (EWRC), established under the Electricity Act 2011 and the Electricity and Water Regulatory Commission Act 2011. The Electricity Distribution and Supply Authority (EDSA) is responsible for electricity distribution and supply in Sierra Leone, while the Electricity Generation and Transmission Company (EGTC) handles generation and transmission. Any BESS installation intended to connect to the national grid or supply electricity commercially requires an EWRC licence. Sierra Leone's national grid operates at 230 V single-phase and 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz. China's domestic grid runs at 220 V single-phase and 380 V three-phase at 50 Hz — a voltage difference requiring PCS reconfiguration and revalidation. Sierra Leone has one of the world's lowest electrification rates; BESS is deployed predominantly in donor-backed solar mini-grid projects (historically supported by UNOPS, UK FCDO, World Bank, and AfDB) and for grid-stability purposes. Donor-financed project specifications for BESS typically reference IEC 62933-2-1 (Unit Parameters and Testing Methods) and IEC 62933-5-2 (Safety Requirements for Electrochemical-Based Systems). A publicly accessible EDSA or EWRC technical specification document specifically for BESS grid connection has not been confirmed as of the dataset date; project-specific connection requirements must be obtained directly from EDSA and EWRC.
summary.zh: 塞拉利昂电力部门由依据《2011年电力法》和《2011年电力和水务监管委员会法》设立的电力和水务监管委员会（EWRC）监管。电力配送与供应局（EDSA）负责塞拉利昂的电力配送与供应，电力发电与输电公司（EGTC）负责发电和输电。任何拟接入国家电网或商业供电的BESS装置均须取得EWRC许可证。塞拉利昂国家电网单相电压为230 V，三相电压为400 V，频率为50 Hz。中国国内电网单相为220 V，三相为380 V，频率为50 Hz——电压差异要求对储能变流器（PCS）重新配置和验证。塞拉利昂是全球电气化率最低的国家之一；BESS主要部署在捐助方支持的太阳能微电网项目（历史上由UNOPS、英国外交发展部FCDO、世界银行和非洲开发银行提供支持）及电网稳定用途。捐助方资助的BESS项目规格通常引用IEC 62933-2-1（单元参数和测试方法）和IEC 62933-5-2（电化学系统安全要求）。截至本数据集日期，EDSA或EWRC尚未经公开确认发布专门针对BESS并网的技术规格文件；项目专属并网要求须直接向EDSA和EWRC获取。
summary.zht: 獅子山電力部門由依據《2011年電力法》和《2011年電力和水務監管委員會法》設立的電力和水務監管委員會（EWRC）監管。電力配送與供應局（EDSA）負責獅子山的電力配送與供應，電力發電與輸電公司（EGTC）負責發電和輸電。任何擬接入國家電網或商業供電的BESS裝置均須取得EWRC許可證。獅子山國家電網單相電壓為230 V，三相電壓為400 V，頻率為50 Hz。中國國內電網單相為220 V，三相為380 V，頻率為50 Hz——電壓差異要求對儲能變流器（PCS）重新配置和驗證。獅子山是全球電氣化率最低的國家之一；BESS主要部署在捐助方支持的太陽能微電網項目（歷史上由UNOPS、英國外交發展部FCDO、世界銀行和非洲開發銀行提供支持）及電網穩定用途。捐助方資助的BESS項目規格通常引用IEC 62933-2-1（單元參數和測試方法）和IEC 62933-5-2（電化學系統安全要求）。截至本數據集日期，EDSA或EWRC尚未經公開確認發布專門針對BESS併網的技術規格文件；項目專屬併網要求須直接向EDSA和EWRC獲取。

standards_or_laws: Electricity Act 2011 (Sierra Leone) — primary electricity sector legislation establishing licensing and technical oversight framework

Electricity and Water Regulatory Commission Act 2011 (Sierra Leone) — establishes EWRC as the sector regulator; licensing of electricity generation, transmission, distribution, and supply including storage
IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods — General Specification (expected in donor-financed project specifications)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected in donor-financed project specifications)
Sierra Leone national grid parameters: 230 V single-phase, 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz

summary.en: China's grid-connection requirements for BESS are governed by GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) and GB/T 34120-2023 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network). The power conversion system (PCS) — the bidirectional inverter — is assessed under NB/T 42090-2016 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters). Chinese BESS products are validated through National Energy Administration (NEA)-authorised grid-operator approval procedures. China's grid runs at 50 Hz — the same frequency as Sierra Leone — but at 220/380 V versus Sierra Leone's 230/400 V. PCS voltage protection thresholds, ride-through settings, and anti-islanding parameters configured for China's 220/380 V grid must be reconfigured and retested for Sierra Leone's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid before connection. Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals are not recognised by EWRC or EDSA.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网要求由GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）和GB/T 34120-2023（电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范）管控。储能变流器（PCS）依据NB/T 42090-2016（储能变流器检测技术规程）进行评估。中国BESS产品通过国家能源局（NEA）授权的电网运营商审批程序获得认可。中国电网频率同为50 Hz，但电压为220/380 V，与塞拉利昂的230/400 V不同。针对中国220/380 V电网配置的PCS电压保护阈值、穿越参数及防孤岛参数，须在接入前重新针对塞拉利昂230/400 V、50 Hz电网条件进行配置和测试。中国GB/T BESS并网证书和NEA审批不被EWRC或EDSA认可。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網要求由GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）和GB/T 34120-2023（電化學儲能系統接入配電網技術規範）管控。儲能變流器（PCS）依據NB/T 42090-2016（儲能變流器檢測技術規程）進行評估。中國BESS產品通過國家能源局（NEA）授權的電網運營商審批程序獲得認可。中國電網頻率同為50 Hz，但電壓為220/380 V，與獅子山的230/400 V不同。針對中國220/380 V電網配置的PCS電壓保護閾值、穿越參數及防孤島參數，須在接入前重新針對獅子山230/400 V、50 Hz電網條件進行配置和測試。中國GB/T BESS併網證書和NEA審批不被EWRC或EDSA認可。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 34120-2023 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals do not satisfy EWRC licensing or EDSA connection requirements in Sierra Leone. Key issues requiring action: (a) voltage reconfiguration — Sierra Leone is 230/400 V whereas China is 220/380 V; PCS voltage protection thresholds, ride-through settings, and anti-islanding parameters must be reconfigured and retested; (b) EWRC licence — obtain the appropriate EWRC electricity generation or supply licence before connecting BESS to the Sierra Leone national grid or operating a commercial mini-grid; (c) EDSA/EGTC connection agreement — engage EDSA directly for distribution-connected BESS or EGTC for transmission-connected BESS to obtain project-specific technical connection requirements; (d) donor/lender specifications — for donor-financed projects, confirm whether IEC 62933-2-1 and IEC 62933-5-2 evidence is required in the procurement specification; (e) mini-grid context — if BESS is deployed in an off-grid or mini-grid configuration, confirm with EWRC whether the mini-grid licensing framework applies and which technical specifications must be met; (f) SCADA and communication protocols — confirm monitoring interface requirements with the project owner or EDSA before equipment procurement.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T BESS并网证书和NEA审批不满足塞拉利昂EWRC许可或EDSA并网要求。需采取行动的关键问题：（a）电压重新配置——塞拉利昂为230/400 V，中国为220/380 V；PCS电压保护阈值、穿越参数及防孤岛参数须重新配置并测试；（b）EWRC许可证——在将BESS接入塞拉利昂国家电网或运营商业微电网前，取得适当的EWRC发电或供电许可证；（c）EDSA/EGTC并网协议——直接与EDSA（配电并网）或EGTC（输电并网）接触，获取项目专属技术并网要求；（d）捐助方/贷款方规格——对于捐助方资助项目，确认采购规格中是否要求IEC 62933-2-1和IEC 62933-5-2证据；（e）微电网背景——若BESS部署于离网或微电网配置，向EWRC确认微电网许可框架是否适用及须满足的技术规格；（f）SCADA和通信协议——在设备采购前与项目业主或EDSA确认监控接口要求。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T BESS併網證書和NEA審批不滿足獅子山EWRC許可或EDSA併網要求。需採取行動的關鍵問題：（a）電壓重新配置——獅子山為230/400 V，中國為220/380 V；PCS電壓保護閾值、穿越參數及防孤島參數須重新配置並測試；（b）EWRC許可證——在將BESS接入獅子山國家電網或運營商業微電網前，取得適當的EWRC發電或供電許可證；（c）EDSA/EGTC併網協議——直接與EDSA（配電併網）或EGTC（輸電併網）接觸，獲取項目專屬技術併網要求；（d）捐助方/貸款方規格——對於捐助方資助項目，確認採購規格中是否要求IEC 62933-2-1和IEC 62933-5-2證據；（e）微電網背景——若BESS部署於離網或微電網配置，向EWRC確認微電網許可框架是否適用及須滿足的技術規格；（f）SCADA和通訊協議——在設備採購前與項目業主或EDSA確認監控接口要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EWRC licence required for commercial electricity supply and grid-connected BESS in Sierra Leone; EDSA connection agreement required for distribution-connected systems; specific technical connection standards for BESS not confirmed from publicly accessible sources as of dataset date — verify directly with EWRC and EDSA
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 36558 and NEA grid-operator approval procedures are mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China; not transferable to Sierra Leone

source.publisher: Electricity and Water Regulatory Commission (EWRC), Sierra Leone

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection compliance and NEA approvals do not satisfy Sierra Leone EWRC or EDSA requirements. BESS PCS must be reconfigured for Sierra Leone's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid. Obtain EWRC licensing before connecting to the national grid or operating a commercial mini-grid. Engage EDSA directly for distribution-level connection requirements. For donor-financed projects, confirm IEC 62933 evidence obligations with the project owner and lender. No publicly accessible EWRC or EDSA technical specification specifically for BESS grid connection has been confirmed as of the dataset date — direct engagement is essential before equipment procurement is finalised.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T BESS并网合规和NEA审批不满足塞拉利昂EWRC或EDSA要求。BESS储能变流器须重新针对塞拉利昂230/400 V 50 Hz电网进行配置。在接入国家电网或运营商业微电网前须取得EWRC许可。直接与EDSA接触以获取配电级并网要求。对于捐助方资助项目，向项目业主和贷款方确认IEC 62933证据义务。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认EWRC或EDSA公开发布专门针对BESS并网的技术规格——在设备采购最终确定前，直接接触至关重要。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T BESS併網合規和NEA審批不滿足獅子山EWRC或EDSA要求。BESS儲能變流器須重新針對獅子山230/400 V 50 Hz電網進行配置。在接入國家電網或運營商業微電網前須取得EWRC許可。直接與EDSA接觸以獲取配電級併網要求。對於捐助方資助項目，向項目業主和貸款方確認IEC 62933證據義務。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認EWRC或EDSA公開發布專門針對BESS併網的技術規格——在設備採購最終確定前，直接接觸至關重要。
